title: taraxacum reclinatum
intro: Taraxacum reclinatum, also known as the upright dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum reclinatum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. Taraxacum reclinatum is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption, and can also be used topically in the form of creams and salves.
